channel.title: Stocks Feed
channel.description: This feed is responsible for generating the rss feed related to the topic Stocks

item.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 Post Record Highs on Solid Earnings
item.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Friday closed up +0.29%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed down -0.31%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed up +0.94%.
item.dc:creator: Barchart
item.nasdaq:tickers: MSTR, ALK, AAPL, INTU, SNDK, DDOG, GLXY, VEEV, AMGN, COIN, CLX, MSFT, PSKY, STX, AMD, RBLX, SPY, DIA, TWLO, RDDT, SYK, ADSK, EL, MU, RMD, ORCL, WDAY, QQQ, INTC, NOW, ADBE, TEAM, MCHP, RIOT, CRM

item.title: Dollar Rebounds as Trade Tensions Resurface
item.description: The dollar index (DXY00 ) on Friday rose +0.12%. The dollar recovered from a 2-week low on Friday and finished higher.
item.dc:creator: Barchart
